notes: Parent and ten native subissues created; live Project 28 fields populated.
Local topology, native subissues, issue markers, dependencies, evidence ledgers, and Project 28 fields validated.
Fixed cross-track error-state leakage in local validation; focused tests and Ruff passed.
After fixing the frozen v1 baseline to allow separately governed post-v1 tracks, the Python 3.12 suite passed: 2032 passed, 16 skipped.

Python 3.12 and minimum dependencies: 2032 passed, 16 skipped. Python 3.13, Python 3.14, and maximum dependencies: 2033 passed, 15 skipped. Coverage: 91.01%, above the 90% threshold. Environments ran sequentially because the PortableSSD lacked capacity for the full matrix concurrently.

command: pnpm --dir docs/astro-site run check && pnpm --dir docs/astro-site run build
notes: Astro 7.1.3 and Starlight 0.41.4 produced 704 static pages, including 617 generated public Python API pages; Astro diagnostics, internal links, Pagefind, and llms.txt passed. The source-pinned plugin remains a separate draft-PR and publication gate.

command: pnpm audit --prod; python scripts/repo_harness.py; uv run bash scripts/vale_prose.sh; pytest tests/test_astro_docs_contract.py tests/test_binding_matrix.py --no-cov; python scripts/validate_rust_polyglot_programme.py --live-github
notes: Dependency audit found no known vulnerabilities; repository harness, Vale, focused contracts, live governance validation, and diff checks passed. Conductor Python style guide was applicable only to changed contract tests and passed Ruff; no TypeScript style guide is selected in this repository.

The plugin's complete local Vitest run passed 97 files and 753 executed tests, with 11 toolchain-conditioned skips. Stale route-slug expectations found by hosted CI were corrected in plugin commit 3561e72.
